headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https://*.basemaps.cartocdn.com https://*.tile.openstreetmap.org; connect-src 'self' https://*.basemaps.cartocdn.com; frame-ancestors 'none';
